cuisine_type: 本帮菜 / 江浙菜 (refined Shanghainese in a villa)
vibe_and_space: Three-story 1930s villa — every meal is served in a private dining room. Antique furniture, art on walls, butler-style service. Quiet, no music. Set up for slow leisurely dinners.
one_paragraph_recommendation: The flagship of the Fu Group's villa-restaurant series — all meals are private-room only, which makes it the single best business-dinner default in Shanghai when budget is in the 600-900¥ range. The food is refined Shanghainese rather than experimental; the experience is the room. Recommend for business hosting, in-laws meeting, or any meal where the conversation matters more than the cuisine being innovative. Two siblings (Fu 1015, Fu 1039) are smaller and even more intimate.
